transcript: Yeah, when does that Green Julius come out?
Um... actually, I've heard no such thing. Yeah, I haven't heard anything about that.
No, we don't have Grapefruit Julius.
Dude, shut the fuck up. You're a fuckin' idiot.

I'm gonna fuckin' kick your ass, dude. I wish you'd come up here, dude, and order a Julius, 'cause I'll recognize your fuckin' voice, and we'll fuckin' straight beat you with a motherfuckin' blender, you little 'ho.
